shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The blocker occupies one 64x64px cell and keeps crisp silhouette edges.
differences: Layered brown, slate, and moss pixels communicate an unplaceable terrain tile.
Upper-left facets create a readable reflection point for route changes.
The lower edge sinks into mud so the blocker feels embedded.

context.usage: Static board blocker that rejects placement and redirects hazard routes.

specs.texture: Craggy rock facets with moss clusters and a mud stain at the base.
specs.shading: Flat planes with one highlight chip and one recessed dark face.

acceptance_criteria: Rock texture size is exactly 64x64px and fills one board cell.
The moss patch remains readable without exceeding 20 percent of the silhouette area.
The lower mud shadow stays fully inside the cell.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle attached to a blocked-cell entity.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacles_rock_cell_static.png during the Loading state and spawn it only on blocked board coordinates.
runtime_notes: Align the visual origin to the board cell origin.
Leave a 2px transparent gutter for highlights.
Store blocked-cell logic on the gameplay entity.
